posts.text: May GOD help us all! This man is incompetent and insane.

Outrageous.

Stripping Liam Conejo Ramos and his family of asylum is beyond cruel and indefensible. 

This decision must be overturned. Shame.

mprnews.org/story/2026/03/18…

AIPAC is spending $22 million in Illinois on Democratic primaries. 

AIPAC and other Republican super PACs should not be allowed to spend millions using shell PACs to support Israel’s genocidal apartheid regime.

The most disturbing part of his unhinged comments is how comfortable he is in telling the world how stupid he and his followers are. But I guess it’s expected from a man who regularly and publicly fantasized about sleeping with his own daughter and is clearly implicated in the worst pedophile coverup case.


Rapid Response 47 (@RapidResponse47)

"Somali is a third-world, maybe a fourth-world nation... They come here and they steal $19 billion — it's crazy," says @POTUS on the anti-fraud task for

Wildly scary propaganda from this network and it goes to show that threats from the Trump admin is working to not accurately report the news in the war Israel got us into with actual ethos. I hate seeing the news not be the “news” in reporting the facts as they are to report.


Matt Duss (@mattduss)

NETANYAHU: Thank you Trump for giving me the war on Iran I’ve always wanted!

MADDOW: Who benefits from this war?

NETANYAHU: Thank you Trump for doing this for us! Amazing!

MADDOW: Is it the Gulf
